zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Fulco de Markham East於1105年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆時，他的父親Sir Roger de East Markham35歲，母親Elgiva de Ulchel20歲。他和Felice de Lizours至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1157年在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Fulco de Markham East于1105年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆时，他的父亲Sir Roger de East Markham35岁，母亲Elgiva de Ulchel20岁。他和Felice de Lizours至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1157年在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: Fulco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Guido, Mario, Mauricio, Osvaldo.  Spanish Jose, Ana, Angel, Jorge.
Italian: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with the element folk ‘people’.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Fulco de Markham East was born in 1105, in East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Roger de East Markham, was 35 and his mother, Elgiva de Ulchel, was 20. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Felice de Lizours. He died in 1157, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Fulco de Markham East est né en 1105, à East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger d’East Markham, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elgiva de Ulchel, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Felice de Lizours. Il est décédé en 1157, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Fulco de Markham East 1105 in East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger de East Markham 35 und seine Mutter Elgiva de Ulchel 20. Er hatte mit Felice de Lizours mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1157 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fulco de Markham East è nato il nel 1105 nel East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger de East Markham, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elgiva de Ulchel, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Felice de Lizours. Morì nel 1157, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Fulco de Markham Eastが1105年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト マークハムで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de East Markhamは35歳，母Elgiva de Ulchelは20歳であった。彼はFelice de Lizoursとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1157年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Fulco de Markham East(이)가 1105년 영국 노틴그함실르 이스트 마카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger de East Markham(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elgiva de Ulchel(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Felice de Lizours(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1157년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fulco de Markham East nasceu em 1105, em East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger de East Markham, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elgiva de Ulchel, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Felice de Lizours. Ele faleceu em 1157, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Fulco de Markham East родился в 1105 г. в местности эаст мархам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger de East Markham было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elgiva de Ulchel, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Felice de Lizours. Он умер в 1157 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Fulco de Markham East nació en 1105, en East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger de East Markham, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elgiva de Ulchel, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Felice de Lizours. Murió en 1157, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
